sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 53 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution 12.11.2025 Mr. Raza Ali advocate holds brief for Mr. Ayaz Sarwar Jamali, advocate for the applicant This matter is pending since 2017 without any progress and even today is listed for orders as to non-prosecution. The department’s counsel is absent and brief is being held for Mr. Ayaz Sarwar Jamali advocate and requests for adjournment. It appears that the applicant department is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
